endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Blockchain/operations
endpoints.description: Lists the available operations of Microsoft.Blockchain resource provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blockchain/blockchainMembers
endpoints.description: Lists the blockchain members for a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blockchain/locations/{locationName}/checkNameAvailability
endpoints.description: To check whether a resource name is available.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATIONNAME}} with a real locationname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blockchain/locations/{locationName}/listConsortiums
endpoints.description: Lists the available consortiums for a subscription.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Blockchain/skus
